name: FIRST COMMUNITY CORP /SC/
summary: First Community Corp /SC/ is a bank holding company headquartered in South Carolina. Through its subsidiary bank, it provides commercial and retail banking services, including commercial real estate loans, commercial business loans, mortgage loans, and deposit products. The company focuses on lending to small to mid-sized community-based businesses and accepts brokered deposits as an additional funding source.

products.name: Commercial Real Estate Loans
products.description: Loans secured by commercial and multi-family real estate for business customers.

products.name: Commercial Business Loans
products.description: Business loans repaid from borrower cash flows, secured by various collateral.

products.name: Mortgage Loans
products.description: Residential mortgage loan originations and refinancings for individual customers.

products.name: Deposit Products
products.description: Retail and commercial deposit accounts including brokered deposits as a funding source.
